Meaning.En: To set up (software, hardware, or a system) so that it is ready to use.
Meaning.Example: She installed the new operating system on her laptop yesterday.

Situation.Vi: Cài phần mềm vào máy tính hoặc thiết bị.
Situation.En: Setting up software on a computer or device so it can run.

Situation.Vi: Khởi chạy ứng dụng sau khi cài đặt hoàn tất.
Situation.En: Running an application after the installation process is complete.

Meaning.En: To position or fix (equipment, furniture, or a device) in place for use.
Meaning.Example: The technician installed the new air conditioning unit on the roof.

Situation.Vi: Lắp đặt máy lạnh, tủ lạnh, hoặc đồ nội thất vào vị trí sử dụng.
Situation.En: Mounting or positioning appliances or furniture where they will be used.
